etymology.description: 洛(洛) (luò, 'river name') refers to the Luo River, which flows through the region, and 陽(陽) (yáng, 'sun; yang side') means 'north bank of a river' (the 'sunny side' in Northern Hemisphere geography), indicating the north of the Luo River.
etymology.interpretation: 洛(洛) (luò, 'river name') specifically references the Luo River. The term 陽(陽) (yáng, 'north bank of a river') traditionally denotes the sunny side, typically associated with the north side of a river bank. Thus, 洛陽(洛陽) (Luòyáng) refers to the city located on the north bank of the Luo River.

parts.english: sun; yang side; north bank of a river

examples.chinese: 洛阳是一个历史悠久的城市(洛陽是一個歷史悠久的城市)。
examples.pinyin: Luòyáng shì yī gè lìshǐ yōujiǔ de chéngshì.
examples.english: Luoyang is a city with a long history.

examples.chinese: 每年春天(每年春天)，许多人去洛阳赏花(許多人去洛陽賞花)。
examples.pinyin: Měinián chūntiān, xǔduō rén qù Luòyáng shǎng huā.
examples.english: Every spring, many people go to Luoyang to see the flowers.

examples.chinese: 我们计划去洛阳旅行(我們計劃去洛陽旅行)。
examples.english: We plan to travel to Luoyang.
